proposal1.heroHeadline: Gmail is losing hundreds of hours annually on manual proposals. This is where it leaks.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Manually crafting proposals eats away time. Our AI system generates them in just 47 seconds, freeing you to innovate.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Each issue below represents significant ongoing losses.

problems.title: Wasting Hours
problems.description: Each proposal takes 4 hours on average. That's 200 hours a year not spent improving Gmail's user experience.

problems.title: High Labor Costs
problems.description: At $50 per hour, proposal writing costs $10,000 annually. This is money that could enhance Gmail's intuitive services.

problems.title: Missed Opportunities
problems.description: Every hour on proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. Gmail loses thousands in potential revenue.

problems.title: Brand Inconsistency
problems.description: Manual processes lead to branding errors. Each error diminishes Gmail's image, costing user trust.

problems.title: Slow Turnaround
problems.description: Proposals take days to complete. This delay means Gmail risks losing clients to faster competitors.

problems.title: Reduced Focus
problems.description: Time on proposals means less focus on reducing spam, harming Gmail's service quality.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI system replaces all the inefficiencies described above.

solutions.title: Instant Proposals
solutions.description: Currently, proposals take hours to complete. Our system generates them in under a minute.

solutions.title: Cost Reduction
solutions.description: Manual labor costs are high. Our AI slashes these costs significantly by automating the process.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Inconsistencies arise with manual work. Our system ensures every proposal aligns with Gmail's brand.

solutions.title: Faster Turnaround
solutions.description: Proposals currently take days to finalize. Our system completes them instantly, keeping Gmail ahead.

solutions.title: Enhanced Focus
solutions.description: Focus is lost on tedious tasks. Our system allows Gmail to concentrate on reducing spam and enhancing services.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Gmail's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Gmail around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Gmail.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Transform Acme Corp's Communication with Gmail's Intuitive Email Solutions.
proposal2.heroSubheadline: Enhance your productivity and reduce losses with Gmail's efficient email platform, tailored for Acme Corp's needs.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is experiencing losses due to inefficient communication systems.

problems.title: High Email Downtime
problems.description: Every minute your email is down costs your business potential deals and client trust. This can amount to thousands in lost revenue annually.

problems.title: Limited Storage Space
problems.description: Running out of email storage leads to lost historical data and missed opportunities to reference past client interactions.

problems.title: Excessive Spam Emails
problems.description: Wasting time managing spam results in decreased productivity and missed important communications, costing hours of valuable employee time.

problems.title: Poor Mobile Access
problems.description: Limited mobile access means missed communications when your team is on the go, affecting real-time decision-making and operational efficiency.

problems.title: Lack of Collaboration Tools
problems.description: Without integrated collaboration tools, your team struggles to work effectively, delaying project timelines and affecting client satisfaction.

problems.title: Security Vulnerabilities
problems.description: Every security breach risks client data and trust, leading to potential legal consequences and loss of business reputation.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Gmail offers solutions that directly address these communication challenges.

solutions.title: Gmail's 15 GB Storage
solutions.description: Ensure all your emails are stored safely with ample space, reducing data loss risks.

solutions.title: Advanced Spam Filtering
solutions.description: Reduce time spent on spam management with Gmail's intelligent filtering, enhancing productivity.

solutions.title: Mobile Access
solutions.description: Stay connected wherever you are with full mobile access, ensuring seamless communication on the go.

solutions.title: Google Workspace
solutions.description: Integrate Gmail with Google Workspace for a full suite of collaboration tools, improving team efficiency.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: Gmail is designed to enhance communication efficiency with intuitive and reliable solutions.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Reliability
whyUsCards.description: Gmail offers industry-leading uptime and reliability for uninterrupted communication.

whyUsCards.title: User-Friendly Interface
whyUsCards.description: Our platform is designed for ease of use, ensuring your team can adapt quickly.

whyUsCards.title: Robust Security
whyUsCards.description: Gmail's advanced security features protect your data and maintain client trust.

whyUsCards.title: Comprehensive Support
whyUsCards.description: Our support team is ready to assist you, ensuring smooth operations and quick resolutions.

proposal2.teamIntro: Meet our dedicated team leading your project.

team.name: there
team.bio: Leading strategy and client relationships, I ensure that every project aligns with our client's goals and expectations.

proposal2.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Discovery & Planning
process.description: Understanding your needs and planning the solution.

process.title: Implementation
process.description: Deploying Gmail solutions tailored to your business.

process.title: Testing & Training
process.description: Ensuring everything works smoothly and training your team.

pricing.name: Basic Plan
pricing.description: Ideal for small teams looking to improve email efficiency.

pricing.description: Recommended for businesses seeking enhanced productivity and collaboration.
